title: New method uses waste bread to replace fossil fuels in chemical manufacturing
description: Researchers have developed a sustainable, "one-pot" method for hydrogenation using waste bread rather than fossil fuels.

title: The Trial Of Public Opinion: Singer Simi Faces Backlash As “Digital Archaeology” Collides With Activism
description: What began as a viral TikTok confession has spiraled into a high-stakes cultural debate, placing Nigerian singer Simi at the center of a social media firestorm. The controversy, which bridges 14-year-old tweets and modern-day allegations of “clout-chasing,” has reignited a fierce national conversation regarding sexual violence, false accusations, and the unforgiving nature of the digital [...]
